allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Enhance application launcher with dynamic shortcuts and system defaults

Add conditional email launcher (Outlook/Gmail), system default browser detection, and new app shortcuts (VSCode, Teams, Loop, Granola). Remap shortcuts for better ergonomics: Terminal (T→I), Notes (N→O), Teams (T).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Change Cerebral automation shortcut from C to A

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update Cerebral layout to use browser and iTerm across dual screens

Change Cerebral layout from Obsidian/VSCode on single screen to:
- Browser (default) on left half of ultrawide
- Obsidian on right half of ultrawide  
- iTerm full screen on built-in display

Focus switches to iTerm after positioning all windows.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(h\) for h in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if h.get\('LSHandlerURLScheme'\) in \('http','https'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys; s=sys.stdin.read\(\); import re; [print\(m\) for m in re.findall\(r'\\"LSHandlerRoleAll\\":\\"[^\\"]+\\",\\"LSHandlerURLScheme\\":\\"https?\\"', s\)]")
